title: Touhou Origins
description: Adds 16+ origins to the Origins mod inspired by the Touhou Project series
body:
## Touhou Origins A mod for the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) that adds more origins to the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod inspired by the [Touhou Project](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Touhou_Wiki) series.
Currently includes the following origins and their variations Earth Rabbit Moon Rabbit Kappa Celestial Fairy Ghost Wolf Tengu Bake-Danuki Satori Oni Vengeful Spirit Oarfish Nue Crow Tengu Jiang Shi Vampire Amanojaku Haniwa
--- ### About Shikigami Beginning with version 2.0.0, players can now become a [shikigami](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Shikigami) of another player. This works with any origin and provides an additional set of powers. To avoid any compatibility issues, Touhou Origins provides two new keybinds exclusively for shikigami (unbound by default).
List of powers and how to become one **Boundless Servitude** By using a written book titled "contract" on another player holding a lead renamed to "tether", you become their shikigami for life, gaining a host of new abilities (and drawbacks). **Faithful Protector** You gain 1 extra base melee and ranged damage, as well as a 10% increase in movement speed, while near your master. **Spiritual Gaze** You are always aware of your master's presence and can see their health as a colored glow around them. Similarly, your master can also see you. Can be toggled using the secondary key. **By Master's Side** After channeling for 4 seconds, teleports you to your master, regardless of dimension, and applies Resistance to them for 5 seconds. This costs 50 experience points. Activated using the primary key. **Linked by the Soul** If your master meets an untimely demise, you will also perish.
--- **Special thanks to the following people for their translations:** - Brazilian Portuguese (by Tlank) - Chinese (by EDTmagiclab) - Korean (by lolrtmit) *Translations might not be 100% accurate or up-to-date.* **A big thank you to Apace for creating the Origins mod. It's been really fun working on custom origins for it. Without it and the other great dependencies, this project wouldn't have been possible:** - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) - [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) - [Impersonate](https://modrinth.com/mod/impersonate) - [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli) (formerly) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) *Disclaimer: This is a fan work based on Touhou Project. Touhou Project and its characters are the property of Team Shanghai Alice (ZUN).*
